jobs.title: Environmental Project Manager (Asbestos, Lead, Hazardous Materials)
jobs.description:
We are partnering with a leading organization to hire an experienced Environmental Project Manager focused on asbestos and lead compliance across capital projects and facilities.
This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast paced environment, enjoys owning projects end to end, and brings deep knowledge of hazardous materials regulations in California.

What you will do:

Manage asbestos and lead compliance programs across multiple facilities and capital projects
Lead inspections, surveys, air monitoring, and clearance testing
Develop abatement scopes and technical specifications
Oversee consultants, contractors, and vendors to ensure regulatory compliance
Manage project budgets, schedules, permitting, and stakeholder communication
Serve as the primary liaison with regulatory agencies
Drive projects from planning through construction closeout

What we are looking for:

Bachelor’s degree in Architecture, Engineering, Construction Management, or related field
5+ years of experience managing capital projects involving asbestos and lead abatement
California Certified Asbestos Consultant (CAC)
CDPH Lead Inspector or Assessor Certification
Strong knowledge of OSHA, EPA, and California environmental regulations
Proven experience managing budgets, schedules, and contractor performance

Salary starting around $140,000 annually
